category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Qatar.

title.en: China-to-Qatar EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入卡塔尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入卡塔爾：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Qatar QGOSM / Kahramaa requirements, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, Kahramaa Tarsheed grid-connection and project-approval requirements, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与卡塔尔QGOSM / 卡赫拉马要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、卡赫拉马Tarsheed并网及项目审批要求、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與卡塔爾QGOSM / 卡赫拉馬要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、卡赫拉馬Tarsheed併網及項目審批要求、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Qatar, the confirmed practical gaps are IEC-based safety and EMC evidence required by Kahramaa guidelines (Section 07 / IEC 61851), connector redesign from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 since Qatar's IEC-aligned infrastructure is physically incompatible with GB/T connectors, Kahramaa Tarsheed project-acceptance for grid-connected installations, IP65 / IP54 enclosure protection for Qatar's desert climate, and OCPP back-office interoperability for networked chargers. Qatar operates on 240 V / 50 Hz, versus China's 220 V / 50 Hz domestic baseline, which requires voltage-range and derating confirmation. A blanket Qatar whole-unit mandatory EVSE certification rule through QGOSM could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14; exporters should verify the current conformity assessment route, HS code, charger type, and project approval path before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入卡塔尔时，已确认的实务差距包括：卡赫拉马指引（Section 07 / IEC 61851）要求的IEC体系安全及EMC证据；由于卡塔尔IEC体系基础设施在物理上与GB/T接口不兼容，须将接口从GB/T 20234改为IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2；并网安装需通过卡赫拉马Tarsheed项目验收；针对卡塔尔沙漠气候须满足IP65 / IP54防护等级；联网充电桩需满足OCPP后台互操作要求。卡塔尔电网为240 V / 50 Hz，而中国国内基线为220 V / 50 Hz，须确认电压范围和降额设计。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认适用于所有EVSE整机的卡塔尔QGOSM强制认证规则，出口商应在出货前核实当前合格评定路径、HS编码、充电桩类型和项目审批路径。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入卡塔爾時，已確認的實務差距包括：卡赫拉馬指引（Section 07 / IEC 61851）要求的IEC體系安全及EMC證據；由於卡塔爾IEC體系基礎設施在物理上與GB/T接口不兼容，須將接口從GB/T 20234改為IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2；併網安裝需通過卡赫拉馬Tarsheed項目驗收；針對卡塔爾沙漠氣候須滿足IP65 / IP54防護等級；聯網充電樁需滿足OCPP後台互操作要求。卡塔爾電網為240 V / 50 Hz，而中國國內基線為220 V / 50 Hz，須確認電壓範圍和降額設計。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認適用於所有EVSE整機的卡塔爾QGOSM強制認證規則，出口商應在出貨前核實當前合格評定路徑、HS編碼、充電樁類型和項目審批路徑。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, QGOSM scope determination, Kahramaa approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Qatar conformity assessment rules, Kahramaa Tarsheed project requirements, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、QGOSM适用范围裁定、卡赫拉马批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行卡塔尔合格评定规则、卡赫拉马Tarsheed项目要求、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、QGOSM適用範圍裁定、卡赫拉馬批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行卡塔爾合格評定規則、卡赫拉馬Tarsheed項目要求、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
